Prove Up Hearing For A Disabled Adult Compromise Claim
Off Calendar Oct-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult with Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Alexix McKenna, Esq. for Petitioner: Kerry Walker, present as Guardian at litem for and with: Amanda Doe, an Adult Claimant with Disablity, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $116,854.00
Costs $32,584.00
A net balance of $350,562.00 to be placed in a Special Need Trust, for the benefit of the Claimant.
Counsel to prepare Order for signature.

Oct. 27, 2006
Order Approving Compromise of Claim of an Adult with Disability signed by Comm. Kaplan.
